findings.title: Pwn Request: pull_request_target checks out PR head branch
findings.description: Workflow is triggered by pull_request_target and job build checks out the PR contributor's code.
findings.remediation: Never check out PR head code in pull_request_target workflows.
findings.cwe: CWE-913: Improper Control of Dynamically-Managed Code Resources

findings.title: Script injection via untrusted context expression
findings.description: Job build interpolates untrusted GitHub context data into a run step.
findings.remediation: Use an intermediate environment variable instead of inline context expressions.

findings.title: Workflow-level permission: write-all
findings.description: The workflow grants write access to all scopes at the top level.
findings.remediation: Set permissions: {} at the workflow level, then grant per-job permissions.
